programmes.show_description: Clayton's Towing navigates tidal pressures and bull sharks to salvage two yachts from Moreton Bay as part of the Queensland Government's clean-up of abandoned wrecks.
Steve Grahame is preparing for an epic journey: a 3,000km trek to the top of Western Australia.
Recovery op Mark tackles a Vauxhall left dangling over the edge of a narrow canal lock in wet weather, and Daniel helps with a recovery operation after a smash on the M25.
A 44-tonne gravel lorry careers off the A697, plunging down an embankment, and Gary must pick up the pieces. In Croydon, Stu has a complex recovery: a bin lorry is stuck in deep mud.
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Teleshopping.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Award winning eFOLDi lightweight electric folding mobility scooters.
Shop JML, the home for clever ideas.
Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise holiday is your greatest one!
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
On the edge of the Peak District, the Traffic Cops detain a suspected drink driver, but he denies any wrongdoing and goes on the attack, threatening to harm the officers.
There's a hunt for a dodgy Fiesta. But with the interceptors on its tail, the driver stacks the vehicle into a roundabout and the occupants go to ground.
Police chase a stolen Renault until the driver crashes; a strip search reveals Class A drugs; police bust a large-scale cannabis farm; a man forgets to pay his gas bill.
Western. When a town boss confiscates homesteaders' supplies after gold is discovered, a tough cowboy risks his life to try and get it to them. Starring James Stewart and Rock Hudson. (1952)
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Western. When a town boss confiscates homesteaders' supplies after gold is discovered, a tough cowboy risks his life to try and get it to them. Starring James Stewart and Rock Hudson. (1952)
Action-packed Western starring Gary Cooper and Phyllis Thaxter. A gun-slinging Union officer goes undercover during the American Civil War to break up a Confederate gang. (1952)
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Action-packed Western starring Gary Cooper and Phyllis Thaxter. A gun-slinging Union officer goes undercover during the American Civil War to break up a Confederate gang. (1952)
The challenges of lifting and shifting a steam locomotive in freezing cold temperatures, and moving 15 brand new excavators with a combined weight of 300 tonnes.
Action-packed highlights from the documentary series following Yorkshire-based law enforcers. Can the cops stop a nighttime riot from breaking out in Bradford?
AJ and Richie pursue a van speeding through narrow country lanes. Sparks fly when dog handler Justin and police dog Elsa capture two burglars.
A runaway mugger rams Faulko off the road and puts him in hospital. The team hunts down the driver responsible. Meanwhile Liam locks up a rogue biker.
On the hunt for a van linked to drug dealing and organised crime in Sunderland, and in Newcastle a misted-up car draws more attention to itself with a V-sign.
Charlie's first solo pursuit is at 115mph after a dangerous driver who takes risk after risk. Sandra and Chris face a battle to bag a breath sample from a suspected drink driver.
A woman's car is stolen at knifepoint and police mobilize to find her vehicle and the perpetrator; police break down the door of a woman who has failed to appear for her hearing.
...Takedown. A reckless narcotics agent pursues a Mexican cartel leader, but finds himself sucked into the criminal underworld where the line between good and evil becomes blurred.
Jessie from GRS Towing has to transport an eight-tonne river boat across three states for a desperate oyster farmer who is relying on the boat to save her family's business.
Documentary series following truckers in Australia. Mark King has to haul a monster rig to a coal mine 700km away. Steve Grahame is stuck just 70km from his destination.
A 26-tonne tanker gets stuck in a waterlogged verge on the busy A5, fully loaded and leaning to one side. Plus, moving an ageing double decker bus that's been immobile for eight years.
Two coaches which tried passing each other on a narrow snowy lane come to grief, and a bin lorry stuck in mud is in danger of keeling over.

Documentary series following the crews who keep Britain moving when a big freeze strikes.
This episode kicks off with a pursuit of a drunk driver who's suspected to be armed with a knife. Interceptors Dan and Jim manage to track down the suspect.
This episode kicks off with a pursuit that pushes speeds of almost 150 miles an hour. Coups and the team get behind a high-performance Mercedes that speeds away.
Western. A reformed gambler turned preacher partnered with a pretty female fugitive outlaw runs into an old pal who's also a marshal, and they both fall for the same bad gal. (1949)

Western. A reformed gambler turned preacher partnered with a pretty female fugitive outlaw runs into an old pal who's also a marshal, and they both fall for the same bad gal. (1949)
Comedy western about a penniless outlaw who attempts a heist in a bid to acquire the wealth he needs to keep his fiancee. Director: Andrew V McClaglen.
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Comedy western about a penniless outlaw who attempts a heist in a bid to acquire the wealth he needs to keep his fiancee. Director: Andrew V McClaglen.
A 50-tonne excavator needs collecting from a farm in Wales, but road closures hinder plans. And Nick and Oscar must move a life-size metal stegosaurus 25 miles to RHS Garden Wisley.
In Bradford there's a high-octane chase through a housing estate, and Yorkshire's back roads have their peace disturbed by two cars carrying gun-toting drug dealers.
Spike breaks out a drug wipe for a teenage tearaway on two wheels, but will the biker heed his dad's wise words?
Chris's tracker dog Ronny has a twitchy nose but will this canine crime fighter manage to track down a villain?
PC Will Hunter follows a suspected cloned car, but its driver refuses to do a breath test. And a pursuit hits dangerous speeds through rural villages.
The Glovers race to get their wood and machines off Erie Mountain before government road restrictions shut them down for spring. Craig's crew rush to get stranded wood off the landing.
A truck-killing river crossing traps the water drillers, cattle truckers David and Kylie battle a blown engine and vintage tractor trucker Mike Partridge makes a crucial wrong turn.
A young Londoner gets an exciting offer to work in his dad's bar in Thailand, but he discovers a world of temptation which he can't resist, breaking his father's golden rule.
